name: canshare-who-bone-primary-histology
title: NZ WHO bone primary histology
description: Histologies used for bone primaries, from WHO Classification of Tumours, Soft Tissue & Bone Tumours (latest edition) - 3. Undifferentiated small round cell sarcomas of bone and soft tissue, 4. Bone tumours or an 'Other' value.

filter.value: (^350921000210103 |New Zealand WHO classification of tumours (5th edition) soft tissue and/or bone undifferentiated small round cell sarcoma histology reference set| OR ^350931000210101 |New Zealand WHO classification of tumours (5th edition) bone histology reference set| OR 74964007 |Other|) MINUS (1187107005 |Plasmacytoma| OR 762691001 |Classic Hodgkin lymphoma| OR 1172695008 |Diffuse large B-cell lymphoma| OR 55150002 |Follicular lymphoma| OR 128803008 |Marginal zone B-cell lymphoma| OR 314926009 |T-cell lymphoma| OR 1162660006 |B lymphoblastic leukaemia/lymphoma| OR 397348006 |T lymphoblastic leukaemia/lymphoma| OR 77381001 |Burkitt lymphoma| OR 1162576007 |Plasma cell myeloma/multiple myeloma| OR 110450007 |Langerhans cell histiocytosis| OR 703711007 |Erdheim-Chester disease| OR 1295376005 |Rosai–Dorfman disease| OR 734044003 |ALK positive anaplastic large cell lymphoma| OR 1172729004 |ALK negative anaplastic large cell lymphoma| OR 1172592001 |Non-Hodgkin lymphoma| OR 53237008 |Anaplastic large cell lymphoma| OR 128812005 |Langerhans cell histiocytosis, disseminated|)
